title: cyclosorus archboldii
intro: Cyclosorus archboldii, also known as Archbold's fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The leaves and roots of Cyclosorus archboldii are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Archbold's fern are often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
